texto: Modern medicine is not scientific, it is full of prejudice, illogic and susceptible to advertising. Doctors are not taught to reason, they are programmed to believe in whatever their medical schools teach them and the leading doctors tell them. Over the past 20 years the drug companies, with their enormous wealth, have taken medicine over and now control its research, what is taught and the information released to the public.
explicacao: Citação de Abram Hoffer sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Modern medicine is not scientific, it is full of prejudice, illogic and susceptible to advertisin…” articula educacao, health, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
